translation.hero_subtitle: Binciken saƙo mai zurfi, duba haɗin gwiwa masu cutarwa, da nazari na ainihin lokaci. Kare sadarwarku.
translation.bento_sandbox_desc: Ware haɗin gwiwa masu cutarwa a tsarin aminci.
translation.stats_trained: SMS Da Aka Koyar Da Su
translation.features_subtitle: Tacewar spam na yau da kullun ta kasa taimakawa Najeriyawa. Fraudlock ya koyi daga SMS na Najeriya, yana magana da yarukan mu, kuma yana raba bayanan sirri da kamfanonin tarho.
translation.feature_0_desc: Samfurin Random Forest wanda aka horar da shi akan misalan SMS na Najeriya 4K+ — zamba BVN, faɗakarwa Ponzi, zamba JAMB.
translation.feature_1_desc: Yana gano zamba a cikin harsunan Najeriya 4. Masu zamba suna canza yaruka — AI ɗinmu yana bibiyar su.
translation.feature_2_desc: AI yana karanta sakamakon da murya a lafazin Najeriya. Kyau ga masu karatu kadan.
translation.feature_3_desc: Ba da rahoto kan lambobin zamba. A rahotanni 20, ana aika lambobin zuwa MTN, Glo, & Airtel.
translation.feature_4_desc: Liqa SMS ɗin — samu % tabbas, matakin hadari, da nuna kalmomi masu shakka cikin 200ms.
translation.feature_5_desc: Kowane hasashe yana nuna fasalullukan TF-IDF, ƙarfafawar kalma, da yiwuwar — AI mai bayyanawa gaba ɗaya.
translation.how_0_desc: Kowane harshe — tsarin mu yana gano yarukan Najeriya da nau'ikan Pidgin na yanki kai tsaye.
translation.how_1_desc: An fitar da fasalullukan n-gram 50K, an auna don kamus zamba na Najeriya.
translation.how_2_desc: Taron da aka horar da predict_proba() — babu akwatin baki.
translation.how_3_desc: Layer na Najeriya musamman: BVN, JAMB, GTB, OTP, tsarin 'ninka kudi'.
translation.how_4_desc: % tabbas, matakin hadari, kalmomi masu shakka — AI ɗinmu yana karantawa da sauti.
translation.lang_subtitle: Canza harshe — kowane gargaɗi da matakin dogaro zai canza. Masu zamba suna canza harshe; AI ɗinmu baya rasa.
translation.lang_0_sample: You have won ₦5,000,000! Send your BVN and ATM PIN to claim your prize now.
translation.lang_1_sample: Oga, your account don block! Send your BVN quick quick make we fix am for you.
translation.lang_2_sample: E ku ile o! Owo ₦2,000,000 ti de fun yin. Fi BVN yin ranse lati gba.
translation.lang_3_sample: Nwanne, ego ₦3,000,000 dị n'akpa gị. Zitere anyị BVN gị ugbu a.
translation.lang_4_sample: Ka samu ₦1,000,000! Aika BVN dinka yanzu don karbar kudin.
translation.community_body_1: Kowane lambar zamba da kuka ba da rahoto ana adana ta, ƙididdige ta, da nazarin ta. Lokacin da lamba ta kai <1>rahotannin al'umma 20</1>, za a ƙara ta zuwa jerin telco ɗinmu — kuma za a nuna ta ga MTN, Glo, da Airtel.
translation.community_body_2: Rahotonku ba zai ɓace ba. Kuna iya bin shi a cikin dashboard na admin, ganin yawan waɗanda suka ba da rahoto akan lamba ɗaya.
translation.community_table_title: Lambobin Da Al'umma Suka Ba Da Rahoto
translation.pricing_1_f0: Duk abin da ke cikin Dan Ƙasa
translation.pricing_1_f4: Dashboard na nazari mai ci gaba
translation.cta_subtitle: Ku shiga hanyar sadarwa ta tsaron zamba AI ta Najeriya. Kyauta ga yan ƙasa. Shiga API ga telcos da bankuna.
translation.footer_tagline: Tsaron Zamba SMS na AI · An Ƙera Don Najeriya · fraudlock.ng
translation.detect_subtitle: Liqa SMS don bincika ko zamba ne. An ƙera da TF-IDF + Random Forest + SVM.
translation.report_subtitle: Ba da rahoto lambobin da suka aiko maka saƙon zamba. Lambobin da ke da rahoto 20+ ana aika su zuwa kamfanonin tarho.
translation.report_step_1: Ka ba da rahoto lambar zamba
translation.report_message_placeholder: Liqa saƙon zamba da ka karba…
translation.report_auto_flagged: 🔴 An nuna kai tsaye ga telcos!
translation.report_progress: {{count}} / {{threshold}} rahotanni da ake bukata don auto-flag
translation.detect_mic_unsupported: Murya ba ta aiki. Yi amfani da Chrome.
translation.numbers_subtitle: Bincika kowane lamba na Najeriya don ganin tarihin zamba.
translation.numbers_clean: Wannan lambar tana da tsafta. Babu rahoto.
translation.numbers_directory_subtitle: Dukkan lambobin da al'umma ta nuna
translation.numbers_empty_directory: Babu lambar da aka nuna tukuna.
